evaluator_ref.description: Evaluator artifact to look up. Identifies the artifact by `id` or `slug` (both project-unique). When no variant_ref or revision_ref is provided, returns the latest revision of the evaluator's default variant.

evaluator_variant_ref.description: Evaluator variant to look up. Identifies the variant by `id` or `slug` (both project-unique). When no revision_ref is provided, returns the latest revision of this variant.

evaluator_revision_ref.description: Evaluator revision to look up. `id` alone identifies a revision (project-unique). `slug` alone identifies a revision (project-unique). `version` alone is a per-variant sequence number and is **not** sufficient on its own; it must be combined with an `evaluator_variant_ref`. Sending only `version` without a variant ref returns HTTP 400.

environment_variant_ref.description: Environment variant to resolve through. Requires `key`.

environment_revision_ref.description: Specific environment revision to resolve through. Requires `key`.

key.title: Key
key.description: Named deployment key inside the environment revision. Required with environment refs.

resolve.title: Resolve
resolve.description: When true, resolve embedded references on the returned revision's `data`.

schema.title: EvaluatorRevisionRetrieveRequest
schema.description:
Body for retrieving one revision, either by direct reference or through an environment key.

Provide an evaluator / variant / revision reference, an environment
reference (with `key` derived from the evaluator slug by default), or a
combination of both. Every reference supplied must agree with the
resolved revision; contradictions return HTTP 400.
